title: Payment Infrastructure for South Asian Creators: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a creator in South Asia trying to sell digital products internationally, but PayPal, Stripe, or Payhip restrict your access due to geographic or banking limitations. You've searched for alternatives but found nothing reliable. This setup guide is your solution, enabling you to bypass these restrictions and start selling digital products immediately. Let's break down the step-by-step process to create a functional store and ensure you get paid. South Asia's creators, it's time to join the global digital market.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

NOWPayments is a payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, eliminating the need for KYC or buyer accounts. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you get a complete store infrastructure in one payment, including the Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. This setup allows you to automate delivery, verify payments, and track orders without the hassle of traditional payment gateways.
What You Need Before You Start

To begin, you'll need a digital product to sell, a unique URL for your store, and a cryptocurrency wallet. You can use the Admin Dashboard to manage orders, track analytics, and access real-time transaction logs. The Core Shop Engine automates delivery and payment verification, ensuring seamless transactions. Ensure you have a working knowledge of cryptocurrencies and wallet management to maximize your store's potential.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Integrate Wallet Connect into your store to enable secure, multi-chain QR code payments. NOWPayments handles payment processing and settlement, eliminating the need for intermediaries. With the Admin Dashboard, you can monitor and manage your orders in real-time. Automate delivery and payment verification through the Core Shop Engine to ensure efficient transactions. Test your setup before going live to ensure a smooth customer experience.
You can bypass PayPal, Stripe, and Payhip restrictions with NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your store, payment, and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live. Advertise your store and digital product on social media, forums, or relevant platforms. As orders come in, the Core Shop Engine will automate delivery and payment verification. The Admin Dashboard helps you track orders and manage analytics. Focus on marketing and delivering exceptional customer experiences to drive repeat business and positive word-of-mouth.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your store grows, you can leverage the Full Stack Bundle's features to scale efficiently. Utilize the Admin Dashboard to refine your analytics, optimize performance, and identify areas for improvement. Integrate new payment methods or cryptocurrencies as needed to cater to a broader customer base. Prioritize customer support and engagement to maintain a loyal customer base and drive long-term growth.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard provides real-time transaction logs and order management, ensuring efficient store operations.
